metadata.title: Ceylon - Modern Requirements Management Platform
metadata.description: Ceylon is a modern requirements management platform that helps teams efficiently manage project requirements, track progress, and collaborate. Supports version views, requirement categorization, priority management, and more.

hero.description: Ceylon is a modern requirements management platform that helps teams better organize, track, and collaborate on requirements

versionView.title: Version View Management
versionView.description: Create multiple version views for each project to clearly manage requirements for different iterations

requirements.title: Requirements Table
requirements.description: Flexible requirements table supporting multi-dimensional management including priority, type, and assignee

collaboration.title: Team Collaboration
collaboration.description: Fine-grained permission control supporting read, write, and admin roles

cli.title: CLI Tool
cli.description: Command line tool support allowing developers to quickly manage requirements from the terminal

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your Ceylon account

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.timeout: Connection timeout, please check your network

avatar.title: Upload Avatar (Optional)
avatar.description: Click avatar to upload, supports JPG, PNG format, max 2MB

success.title: Registration Successful!
success.verifyMessage: We've sent a verification email to {email}. Please check your inbox and click the confirmation link to complete registration.
success.spamTip: Tip: If you don't see the email, please check your spam folder

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.avatarSize: Avatar image must be less than 2MB

logout.title: Logout
logout.confirm: Are you sure you want to logout?

dashboard.title: Projects
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your projects and collaborate with your team

noProjects.title: No projects yet
noProjects.description: Create your first project to start managing requirements with Ceylon

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.deleteWarning: Once deleted, all related data cannot be recovered. Please proceed with caution.
danger.confirmDelete: I confirm I want to delete this project

errors.generic: Something went wrong, please try again later
errors.network: Network error, please check your connection
